feedback: A well-crafted JI composition demonstrating clear formal structure, thoughtful orchestration, and warm sonics. The piece shows solid compositional intent and technical execution across all dimensions.  A structurally well-arced JI/hexany piece with genuine voice-leading and automation craft, somewhat undercut by mix-balance and brightness artifact warnings that suggest the final render doesn't yet match the quality of its composition.

A technically sophisticated xenharmonic composition with intentional orchestration and professional finishing. The hexany approach demonstrates serious harmonic knowledge, though the critical success factor—whether the just-intonation material sounds musically cohesive rather than abstract—requires listening to confirm.  A well-paced, structurally convincing hexany-based piece with a real arc and legitimate JI harmonic interest, undercut somewhat by several voices flagged for harsh/piercing high-frequency content that likely needs taming.  A genuinely composed, complete septimal-JI ambient/electronic piece with a real arc and rich orchestration; euphonic and satisfying rather than daring, with some brittle high-end percussion as its main flaw.

A complete, confidently composed 7-limit/utonal electronic piece whose terraced density arc genuinely enacts its 'ninth wave' concept — ambitious, thematically coherent, and finished, held back only by a very dark, potentially congested mix.

A confident, complete JI techno composition with a genuine tidal arc, thematic development including canon and recapitulation, and a rich septimal/utonal harmonic palette — held back only slightly by a dark, top-veiled mix.
A complete, well-paced JI techno composition with a real structural arc and motivic development that earns its length; held back mainly by a dark, bass-forward mix balance.

A finished, ambitious xenharmonic techno piece with strong formal structure, sophisticated mixing, and genuine compositional craft. The piece commits fully to its artistic vision without compromise, though the marriage of experimental tuning and repetitive dance patterns presents both artistic boldness and the risk of academic remoteness.  A structurally well-conceived, harmonically ambitious JI piece with a genuine narrative arc, somewhat undercut by a persistently bass-heavy, slightly congested mix that dulls its high-frequency character.  A rare xenharmonic piece that actually commits to being a full composition — septimal/dekany JI harmony with real motivic development and canon, wrapped in a confident techno arc — held back mainly by a dark, bass-heavy, somewhat quiet mix.
